mechanism_narrative: Declining federal funds rates reduce the discount rate applied to future corporate cash flows, directly increasing present equity valuations and generating positive forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or positive returns occur in less than 52% of declining rate periods.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and impending recessionary pressures, causing investors to price in lower corporate earnings and producing negative forward returns.
failure_condition: Positive 20-day forward returns occur in more than 55% of triggered instances across rolling 2-year evaluation windows.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts indicates robust consumer spending and wealth effects, which directly boost corporate revenue expectations and generate positive forward equity returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: Joint positive signals yield negative forward returns in more than 60% of observed cases during recovery phases.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production during a tightening cycle signals resilient supply-side capacity that outpaces monetary policy restrictions, supporting short-term equity momentum and positive forward returns.
failure_condition: Five-day forward returns are negative in more than 50% of rising industrial production periods during active tightening phases.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained consumer price index levels above 275 trigger expectations of aggressive central bank tightening, which compresses equity valuations through higher discount rates and produces negative forward returns.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in more than 65% of instances when the consumer price index exceeds the specified threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in total nonfarm payrolls and declining unemployment confirms broad-based labor market strength, which supports consumer spending and corporate earnings growth, driving positive equity returns.
failure_condition: Combined positive labor signals fail to predict positive returns with greater than 55% accuracy over rolling 2-year evaluation windows.

mechanism_narrative: Quarter-over-quarter growth in real GDP reflects expanding economic activity and corporate revenue fundamentals, which directly translate into higher equity valuations and positive forward returns over a three-month horizon.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.01 across all 3-year rolling windows, or positive returns occur in less than 50% of expanding GDP quarters.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp contraction in industrial production combined with rising input costs signals stagflationary pressures, forcing investors to devalue equity portfolios and generating negative forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Positive 5-day forward returns occur in more than 58% of triggered instances across historical stagflationary periods.
